ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the material */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Color of the material */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the material */,
  "thickness_mm" REAL /* Thickness of the material in mm */,
  "price_per_sf" REAL /* Price per square foot */,
  "price_per_box" REAL /* Price per box */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Grade identifier for the quality of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., lumber, tiles, flooring) */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the material */,
  "material_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the material */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the material */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the material information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the material is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., Grade A, Grade B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the quality of the grade */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being tracked */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the stock needs to be reordered */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last physical stock check */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Predicted next reorder date */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physical location where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  "primary_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the supplier */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "is_preferred_supplier" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the supplier is a preferred supplier */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_suppliers" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material-supplier link */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Price at which the supplier provides the material */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for the supplier to deliver the material */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered from the supplier */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the material-supplier link information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_suppliers_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of material ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier fulfilling the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "order_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order (quantity * supply_price + shipping_cost) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment for the order (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the order */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer is associated with */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL to the customer's company website */,
  "primary_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the customer's company */,
  "primary_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "primary_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "is_preferred_customer" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the customer is a preferred customer */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "customer_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer order record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the customer order (quantity * price_per_unit) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the customer order */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_orders_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user to access the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last password change */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
